options.location_text: Burj Khalifa, 1 Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Blvd, Downtown Dubai

options.name: The View at The Palm
options.hook: 360 degrees of Palm Jumeirah
options.why: Atop the Palm Tower, this 360° observation deck gives the only aerial view of the full Palm Jumeirah frond layout plus Dubai Marina and the Gulf beyond.
options.location_text: The View at The Palm, Palm Tower, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai

lists.creator: ladyandhersweetescapes-dubai
lists.headline: Hidden-gem things to do in Dubai
lists.subhead: 12 spots locals rate, pulled from 13 reels

options.name: Keturah Reserve
options.hook: Olive tree avenue in a luxury reserve
options.why: An Instagram-worthy luxury real estate development in Nad Al Sheba with a stunning olive-tree-lined promenade, cafes, vintage cars on display, and free public access.
options.location_text: Keturah Reserve, Nad Al Sheba, Dubai

options.name: Al Khawaneej Walk
options.hook: Love locks and food trucks in the suburbs
options.why: A charming neighborhood outdoor mall with a love lock bridge, al fresco dining, food trucks, and quirky photo spots — free to explore and off the tourist trail.
options.location_text: Al Khawaneej Walk, Dubai

options.name: Sagra Dubai Pasta-Making Class
options.hook: Roll fresh pasta with a real chef
options.why: Learn to make flat pasta from scratch under expert chef guidance at this Italian restaurant — you leave with your own pasta, the recipe, and a delicious tasting session.
options.location_text: Sagra Dubai, Dubai, UAE
options.date_info: Advance reservation recommended; book via Sagra's Instagram

options.name: TEP Factor
options.hook: 21 challenges inside a Dubai cave park
options.why: A cave-like indoor recreation park at JBR with 21 challenges across logic, skills, fitness, and patience categories — perfect for groups, team building, and adventurous families.
options.location_text: TEP Factor, JBR The Walk, Dubai

options.name: Sky Castle by Eness
options.hook: Walk through arches that sing to you
options.why: A globally touring interactive sound and light installation where walking through glowing arches triggers a vibrant melodic symphony. Free public art in Dubai's Design District.
options.location_text: D3, Between Building 9 and 10, Dubai Design District

options.name: Costa Azzurra Electric Catamaran
options.hook: Self-drive electric catamaran for two
options.why: Dubai's most romantic water activity — pilot your own silent electric catamaran for two around The Pointe with Atlantis and the Palm skyline as your backdrop.
options.location_text: The Pointe, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE
options.price_text: AED 200 for 15 min / AED 350 for 30 min (2 persons)

options.name: Hero OdySea Self-Drive Boat Tour
options.hook: Captain your own boat in the Gulf
options.why: Dubai's first self-drive boat tour — no license needed. Cruise the Arabian Gulf for 60–90 minutes past Ain Dubai, Atlantis, Burj Al Arab, and the glittering Marina with a guide on board.
options.location_text: Dubai Harbour, Marina Zone A, Dubai, UAE

options.name: Jameel Arts Centre
options.hook: Free contemporary art by the waterfront
options.why: A free, open-access contemporary art centre at Al Jaddaf Waterfront with an outdoor sculpture park, landscaped gardens, and captivating modern works; Michelin-listed Teible restaurant is next door.
options.location_text: Jameel Arts Centre, Al Jaddaf Waterfront, Dubai

options.name: Al Barsha Pond Park — Swan Paddle Boats
options.hook: Swan boat dates for forty dirhams
options.why: A charming and affordable paddle-boat ride on the pond in Al Barsha Pond Park — 40 AED for 20 minutes in a swan-shaped boat, perfect for a romantic outing.
options.location_text: Al Barsha Pond Park, Al Barsha, Dubai

options.name: Yadawéi Studio — Pottery on the Wheel
options.hook: Throw clay, take home pottery
options.why: Beginner wheel-throwing class includes clay, tools, step-by-step guidance, and a glazing session two weeks later when your piece is fired. Therapeutic, hands-on, and genuinely fun.
options.location_text: Yadawéi Studio, Dubai

options.name: Raining Street at Voco Monaco Dubai
options.hook: A street that rains every fifteen minutes
options.why: Dubai's famous Raining Street at The World Islands resort unleashes a full downpour every 15 minutes — an absurdly fun novelty that leaves you soaked and grinning.
options.location_text: Voco Monaco Dubai, The World Islands, Dubai

options.name: Mo Fun Studio
options.hook: Make your own rug in Dubai
options.why: An arts-and-crafts studio in Dubai offering tufting, fluid art, acrylic painting and more. Make a custom rug in about two hours — a fun, hands-on date or solo creative session.
options.location_text: Mo Fun Studio, Dubai

options.name: Level 43 Sky Lounge
options.hook: Skyline drinks above Sheikh Zayed Road
options.why: Chill rooftop bar at Four Points by Sheraton with panoramic views of Burj Khalifa, Museum of the Future and SZR skyline. Open until 3 AM — perfect for a late-night Dubai fix.
options.location_text: Level 43 Sky Lounge, Four Points by Sheraton, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai

options.name: Pure Sky Lounge
options.hook: Sunset over the Palm from a rooftop
options.why: Rooftop bar and restaurant at Hilton Dubai The Walk with sweeping sunset views over Ain Dubai and Palm Jumeirah. Open 5 PM–1 AM for golden-hour drinks by the sea.
options.location_text: Pure Sky Lounge, Hilton Dubai The Walk, JBR, Dubai
options.price_text: From AED 350 per person (Sunset Brunch package)

options.name: Tapasake
options.hook: Poolside Nikkei with Burj views
options.why: Outdoor lounge and bar at One&Only One Za'abeel serving Nikkei cuisine and cocktails beside the pool deck, with front-row views of the Burj Khalifa at sunset.
options.location_text: One&Only One Za'abeel, Za'abeel, Dubai

options.name: Paros Rooftop Lounge
options.hook: Mediterranean chic above Dubai Marina
options.why: Chic Mediterranean-style rooftop at Taj Dubai in JLT with panoramic views of the Dubai Marina skyline. Open noon to 1 AM — ideal for long lunches or evening cocktails.
options.location_text: Paros, Taj Dubai, JLT, Dubai

options.name: Zeta Seventy Seven at Address Beach Resort
options.hook: Dubai's highest rooftop infinity pool
options.why: An exclusive rooftop lounge on the 77th floor of Address Beach Resort — one of Dubai's most breathtaking bucket-list views, accessible with a minimum spend.
options.location_text: Address Beach Resort, Jumeirah Beach Residence, Dubai, UAE
options.price_text: Minimum spend required; afternoon tea at The Lounge can grant access

options.name: Kulture House Dubai
options.hook: A cafe that doubles as an art gallery
options.why: A vibrant Jumeirah cafe with a concept store and mini gallery — the eclectic menu spans shakshouka to stuffed shell pasta in a quirky, creatively charged space.
options.location_text: Kulture House, Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE

options.name: Dreams Boats Floating Café
options.hook: Coffee date on a floating boat
options.why: A private 45-minute sailing café experience on Al Jaddaf Waterfront — Arabic coffee, tea, cold drinks, and light bites in a serene waterfront setting behind Palazzo Versace.
options.location_text: Al Jaddaf Waterfront, behind Palazzo Versace, Dubai, UAE

options.name: Wavebreaker JBR
options.hook: Sunset beach bar with Ain Dubai view
options.why: A wooden beachfront sunset deck at the Hilton JBR with Ain Dubai panoramas, lively beach bar energy, sundowner deals from 38 AED and charcuterie sharing platters.
options.location_text: Wavebreaker, Hilton Dubai Jumeirah, JBR Walk, Dubai
options.price_text: Drinks from 38 AED; charcuterie platter 85 AED

options.name: Forever Rose Cafe
options.hook: Step inside a 2D fairy-tale cafe
options.why: A whimsical 2D storybook-themed cafe at Box Park Dubai with affordable, well-presented drinks and food — the Forever Rose Latte and Enchanted Waffle are crowd favourites.
options.location_text: Box Park, Al Wasl Road, Dubai

options.name: La Nena
options.hook: A Spanish cafe hidden in industrial Dubai
options.why: A visually stunning Spanish cafe and concept store tucked in Al Quoz's industrial district — the iced Spanish latte and tiramisu cheesecake make it one of Dubai's most aesthetic spots.
options.location_text: La Nena, Al Quoz, Dubai
options.price_text: Iced Spanish Latte 30 AED; Tiramisu Cheesecake 28 AED

options.name: Onda by Pierchic
options.hook: Sunset drinks perched over the sea
options.why: Dubai's most romantic lounge bar sits on a wooden pier over the Arabian Gulf at Jumeirah Al Qasr — sip cocktails while watching the sun sink behind Burj Al Arab with no minimum spend.
options.location_text: Onda by Pierchic, Jumeirah Al Qasr, Dubai
options.price_text: Mocktails AED 45, truffle fries AED 40; no minimum spend

options.name: Sketch Art Cafe
options.hook: Paint your coffee cup here
options.why: A cafe where every order comes with a free paper cup to paint — take it home or display it in the gallery. Other crafts like coloring pads and design-your-own pouches also available.
options.location_text: Sketch Art Cafe, Dubai
options.price_text: AED 39 per drink (Sea Salt Latte, Strawberry Matcha)

options.name: Ibric Cafe
options.hook: Pastel-pretty cafe with 10 AED drinks
options.why: Aesthetically pleasing and genuinely affordable new cafe in Dubai Healthcare City — drinks start at 10 AED and their Pretty in Pink Matcha is a standout at just 23 AED.
options.location_text: Ibric Cafe, Al Jalila Foundation, Dubai Healthcare City, Dubai
options.price_text: Drinks from 10 AED; Pink Matcha 23 AED

options.name: Poseidon Cafe
options.hook: Coffee overlooking the Palm aquarium
options.why: A dreamy aquarium-view cafe inside Atlantis The Palm with no minimum spend. Coffee and a croissant run about AED 50 — affordable luxury in one of Dubai's most iconic resorts.
options.location_text: Poseidon Cafe, Atlantis The Palm, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE

options.name: AMG Kaffeehaus (Mercedes-Benz Cafe)
options.hook: Sip espresso beside a Benz showroom
options.why: A premium cafe inside the Mercedes-Benz showroom in Dubai Design District — glossy luxury cars as decor, great iced lattes and desserts. Two iced lattes + dessert for about AED 80.
options.location_text: AMG Kaffeehaus, Dubai Design District (D3), Dubai, UAE

options.name: Ruby Ru
options.hook: Parisian cocktails at Dubai's creek
options.why: Parisian-style cocktail bar on a terrace overlooking the Dubai Creek. Sundowner happy hour (Ruby's Hour) runs 4–8 pm Monday–Friday with drinks from AED 27 — ideal for a golden-hour date.
options.location_text: Ruby Ru, Marriott Marquis Dubai, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai, UAE
options.price_text: Cocktails from AED 27 (happy hour); Ruby Ru Crispy AED 55

options.name: Dreams Boats Floating Cafe
options.hook: Your coffee date on the water
options.why: A private floating cafe that sails for 45 minutes — enjoy Arabic coffee or tea on the Dubai waterway in intimate, peaceful surroundings.
options.location_text: Dubai waterways, Dubai, UAE

options.name: More Matcha Pop-Up
options.hook: All-matcha pop-up inside Dubai's DIFC
options.why: A cute, Instagrammable pop-up in DIFC serving matcha everything — drinks, desserts, and an oversized vanilla-matcha soft serve (AED 30) that's easily shareable.
options.location_text: DIFC, Dubai, UAE

lists.creator: ladyandhersweetescapes-dubai
lists.headline: High-end things to do in Dubai

options.name: Platinum Heritage Desert Safari
options.hook: Eco-luxury safari in the dunes
options.why: An upscale eco-safari through Dubai Desert Conservation Reserve — spot Arabian Oryx, gazelles, and Ghaf trees on a 60-minute nature drive, with canapés and traditional welcome gifts.
options.location_text: Dubai Desert Conservation Reserve, Dubai, UAE

options.name: Burj Al Arab Guided Tour
options.hook: Inside the world's most iconic hotel
options.why: 90-minute butler-guided tour of the Burj Al Arab including the Royal Suite, Experience Suite, Arabic coffee and dates, and a buggy ride across the private island.
options.location_text: Burj Al Arab, Jumeirah, Dubai

options.name: Resorts World One Cruise
options.hook: Sail to a new port while you party
options.why: Boutique cruise ship departing Dubai with foam parties, silent disco, live shows, a water slide, and multiple restaurants — meals included in the ticket, new destinations every morning.
options.location_text: Resorts World One, Dubai Cruise Terminal, Dubai

options.name: Atlantis The Palm — Christmas Celebrations
options.hook: Christmas magic at Atlantis The Palm
options.why: Atlantis The Palm goes all-out for the festive season — grand decorations, seasonal installations, and a joyful atmosphere that rivals any luxury Christmas destination worldwide.
options.location_text: Atlantis The Palm, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai

options.name: Mazmi Cafe
options.hook: All-day breakfast by the old souk
options.why: A riverside al fresco cafe tucked in Bur Dubai Souk serving all-day breakfast alongside Italian and Arabic dishes, perfect for soaking up Old Dubai atmosphere at ~150 AED for two.
options.location_text: Bur Dubai Souk, Old Dubai

options.name: Cassette DXB
options.hook: A Parisian bistro hidden in Al Quoz
options.why: A modern Parisian-style bistro tucked inside a cultural courtyard in Al Quoz, serving wholesome all-day brunch with vegan options at very reasonable prices.
options.location_text: The Courtyard, Al Quoz, Dubai

options.name: Public Pop-Up at Museum of the Future
options.hook: Breakfast beside the Museum of the Future
options.why: A seasonal al fresco dining pop-up right beside Dubai's iconic Museum of the Future — great breakfast dishes, minimal wait times, and a stunning architectural backdrop.
options.location_text: Museum of the Future, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai
options.date_info: Winter season; breakfast 9 AM – 1 PM daily; open until midnight/1 AM

options.name: Circle Cafe
options.hook: Eat everything on the menu for AED 69
options.why: Weekend all-you-can-eat breakfast at Circle Cafe lets you order anything on the menu — shakshuka, eggs benny, French toast — plus one coffee, for just AED 69.
options.location_text: Circle Cafe, Al Razi Building, Dubai Healthcare City, Dubai

options.name: HAPI
options.hook: Sweet potato pancakes under the trees
options.why: A charming al fresco cafe in Al Khazzan Park opposite City Walk, known for sweet potato pancakes, burgers, and giant marshmallow desserts at around 100 AED for two.
options.location_text: Al Khazzan Park, opposite City Walk, Dubai

options.name: Coco Paris Dubai
options.hook: Pink wonderland with Burj views
options.why: A whimsical pink cafe inside The Mall Jumeirah with Burj Al Arab views, unique milk tea, creative fusions like Udon Pasta, and Instagram-worthy desserts including the city's best brownie.
options.location_text: Coco Paris Dubai, The Mall, Jumeirah, Dubai

options.name: Seven Seeds Dubai
options.hook: Lush garden cafe in Jumeirah
options.why: A cozy garden cafe with lush outdoor seating serving all-day breakfast to wholesome mains; the Truffle Trio pizza and Penne Rose are highlights.
options.location_text: Seven Seeds Dubai, Jumeirah, Dubai
options.price_text: Truffle Trio 85 AED; Penne Rose 55 AED

options.name: Aqaya Cafe
options.hook: Storybook desserts meet Creek Harbour views
options.why: A creative "bakefectionary" in Dubai Creek Harbour serving playful global dishes — think mango-coconut toast disguised as eggs, hot honey chicken, and a mystery cube dessert.
options.location_text: Aqaya Cafe, Dubai Creek Harbour, Dubai

options.name: Biella Italian Cafe and Pizzeria
options.hook: Italian pizza inside an Egyptian palace
options.why: A relaxed Italian cafe inside Wafi City, perfect for a laid-back lunch with an atmosphere that feels worlds away from the usual Dubai spots.
options.location_text: Wafi City, Dubai, UAE

options.name: Arte Museum Dubai
options.hook: Step inside a living digital dreamscape
options.why: A multi-sensory digital art exhibition at Dubai Mall blending visuals, sounds and scents — think infinite waterfalls, beach auroras and blooming camellia immersions plus a mystical tea bar.
options.location_text: Arte Museum, Dubai Mall, Downtown Dubai
options.price_text: General Admission + Tea Bar AED 149 online; VIP AED 249

options.name: Museum of Illusions Dubai
options.hook: Sixty mind-bending illusions await
options.why: 60+ optical illusion displays including an upside-down train cabin, vortex tunnel, anti-gravity room, and distorted room — endlessly fun for families and photo lovers.
options.location_text: Al Seef, Dubai, UAE
options.price_text: Adults AED 80; Child (5–15) AED 60; Family (2+2) AED 225; under-5 free

options.name: Jameel Arts Centre
options.hook: Free contemporary art by the waterfront
options.why: A free, open-access contemporary art centre at Al Jaddaf Waterfront with an outdoor sculpture park, landscaped gardens, and captivating modern works; Michelin-listed Teible restaurant is next door.
options.location_text: Jameel Arts Centre, Al Jaddaf Waterfront, Dubai

options.name: Mohammed Bin Rashid Library
options.hook: The Arab world's largest library
options.why: The largest library in the region — free entry with advance booking — featuring striking architecture and a vast collection of knowledge. Near Creek Metro, requires modest dress.
options.location_text: Mohammed Bin Rashid Library, Al Jaddaf, Dubai, UAE

options.name: Al Shindagha Museum
options.hook: Step into Emirati history for free
options.why: A heritage museum in historic Al Shindagha district tracing the UAE's cultural roots, with free outdoor cultural activities during National Day and paid indoor exhibits.
options.location_text: Al Shindagha Museum, Al Shindagha, Dubai
options.price_text: Free outdoor activities; AED 50 for museum exhibits
options.date_info: Free outdoor activities Nov 28 – Dec 3 (National Day season)

lists.creator: ladyandhersweetescapes-dubai
lists.headline: Standout bakeries & dessert spots in Dubai

options.name: Bakerist UAE
options.hook: Giant croissant made for eight
options.why: Famous for a massive shareable croissant — flaky, crisp outside, soft and layered inside with creamy filling. Pre-book the giant combo in your flavor of choice.
options.location_text: Bakerist UAE, Dubai

options.name: Bageri Form
options.hook: Scandinavian pastries, Burj Khalifa backdrop
options.why: A minimal Scandinavian-inspired bakery in Dubai Design District (D3) with freshly baked pastries, Swedish cinnamon buns, and cozy outdoor seating overlooking the Burj Khalifa.
options.location_text: Bageri Form, Dubai Design District (D3), Dubai

options.name: Bread Ahead
options.hook: Viral doughnuts that conquered Dubai
options.why: Famous London bakery known for its impossibly fluffy filled doughnuts; went viral at Expo 2020. Try the Banana Chocolate Hazelnut or Blackcurrant Cheesecake for 18-20 AED.
options.location_text: Bread Ahead, Mall of the Emirates, Dubai

options.name: Cafe Be.K
options.hook: Japanese shaved-ice heaven in Dubai
options.why: A Japanese dessert cafe at Dubai Festival City specializing in kakigori shaved ice and Shibuya toast — the Watermelon Kakigori is the must-try signature for a cool summer treat.
options.location_text: Cafe Be.K, Dubai Festival City Mall, Ground Floor near Lulu, Dubai, UAE

options.name: Voco Monaco Dubai
options.hook: Adults-only island resort beyond the city
options.why: Adults-only party resort on The World Islands with white-sand beach, a street that rains 24/7, great restaurants, and epic foam parties — reached by private boat from Dubai Canal Marine Station.
options.location_text: Voco Monaco Dubai, The World Islands, Dubai

options.name: Hampton by Hilton Al Seef
options.hook: Dubai's most playful affordable hotel
options.why: A colorful, design-forward Hampton in Dubai's Al Seef heritage district with a map of Dubai painted on the ceiling, free breakfast, lobby games, and rooms from ~200 AED/night.
options.location_text: Hampton by Hilton Al Seef, Al Seef District, Dubai, UAE
options.price_text: ~200 AED/night for two including free breakfast

options.name: 25hours Hotel Dubai
options.hook: Quirky hotel with a vinyl record bar
options.why: A design-forward boutique hotel with a Nomad Day Bar for coffee, a colorful courtyard, mini library, and Analogue Circus — a vintage record shop and nostalgia dive within the lobby.
options.location_text: 25hours Hotel Dubai, Dubai

options.name: Rove Hotels La Mer
options.hook: Beach hotel deal for 99 AED
options.why: A beachfront Rove property at La Mer that ran a 99 AED promo — proof that Dubai beach staycations can be surprisingly affordable when you catch the right deal.
options.location_text: Rove La Mer Beach, La Mer, Jumeirah, Dubai

options.name: Resorts World Cruises — Dubai to Sir Bani Yas
options.hook: Weekend cruise to a private island
options.why: A 2-night cruise departing Dubai on Friday evening and returning Sunday noon, stopping at the wildlife island of Sir Bani Yas — the easiest luxury weekend escape from the city.
options.location_text: Dubai Cruise Terminal 2, Dubai
options.date_info: Departs every Friday at 9 PM, returns Sunday at 12 NN

lists.creator: dotzsoh-singapore
lists.headline: Bucket-list things to do in Kyoto

options.name: Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion)
options.hook: Gold shimmers on a still zen pond
options.why: Kyoto's iconic three-storey gold-leaf-covered Zen Buddhist temple reflected in the Mirror Pond is one of Japan's most breathtaking sights, especially serene in quiet weather.
options.location_text: Kinkaku-ji, 1 Kinkakujicho, Kita Ward, Kyoto

options.name: Sagano Romantic Train (Sagano Scenic Railway)
options.hook: A mountain railway through bamboo groves
options.why: This vintage open-air train winds through the Hozugawa Gorge and Arashiyama's famous bamboo landscape — one of Japan's most scenic short rides.
options.location_text: Sagano Scenic Railway, Sagano Torokko Station, Arashiyama, Kyoto

options.name: Hozugawa River Cruise
options.hook: Float the gorge by wooden boat
options.why: A traditional wooden boat glides 16 km down the Hozu River rapids through forested canyon scenery — the most dramatic way to experience Arashiyama.
options.location_text: Hozugawa River Cruise, Kameoka, Kyoto

options.name: Kiyomizu-dera Temple
options.hook: Autumn crimson at Kyoto's sacred cliff
options.why: Kyoto's iconic hillside temple offers sweeping city views and is surrounded by fiery autumn foliage in fall — a peaceful yet awe-inspiring UNESCO site.
options.location_text: Kiyomizu-dera Temple, 1-294 Kiyomizu, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, Japan
options.date_info: Autumn foliage peak: mid-November to early December

options.name: Fushimi Inari Taisha
options.hook: Ten thousand torii gates at dawn
options.why: Kyoto's iconic Shinto shrine with thousands of vermilion torii gates winding up a forested mountain. An otherworldly tunnel of red that rewards early risers with near-empty paths.
options.location_text: Fushimi Inari Taisha, 68 Fukakusa Yabunouchicho, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto

options.name: Kiyomizu-dera
options.hook: Wooden stage over Kyoto's canopy
options.why: An 8th-century hillside temple whose famous wooden veranda juts out over a wooded valley with sweeping city views. Sacred, dramatic, and utterly photogenic.
options.location_text: Kiyomizudera, 1-294 Kiyomizu, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto

options.name: Higashiyama District
options.hook: Ancient lanes lined with stone lanterns
options.why: Kyoto's best-preserved historic district: narrow cobblestone lanes, traditional machiya townhouses, tea shops and shrines — the Japan of a hundred years ago.
options.location_text: Higashiyama-ku, Kyoto

lists.creator: dotzsoh-singapore
lists.headline: Seasonal things to do in Singapore
lists.subhead: 4 spots locals rate, pulled from 5 reels
lists.lead: Christmas Wonderland at Gardens by the Bay

options.name: Christmas Wonderland at Gardens by the Bay
options.hook: A dazzling Christmas village in the tropics
options.why: Singapore's beloved annual Christmas festival transforms Gardens by the Bay into a fairground of glittering lights, a European market, rides, and festive installations.
options.location_text: Gardens by the Bay, 18 Marina Gardens Drive, Singapore

options.name: Flower Dome – Sakura Festival, Gardens by the Bay
options.hook: Cherry blossoms bloom inside a glass dome
options.why: Singapore's iconic climate-controlled Flower Dome hosts a stunning Sakura festival with real cherry blossom displays — bringing the Japanese spring indoors year-round.
options.location_text: Flower Dome, Gardens by the Bay, 18 Marina Gardens Drive, Singapore
options.date_info: Sakura display seasonal — check Gardens by the Bay for current dates

options.name: Marina Bay Sands New Year's Countdown
options.hook: Fireworks in the sky at Marina Bay Sands
options.why: Marina Bay Sands hosts one of Asia's most spectacular NYE countdowns with a sky-high fireworks show that lights up the entire bay.
options.location_text: Marina Bay Sands, 10 Bayfront Avenue, Singapore

options.name: Marina Bay Sands New Year Fireworks
options.hook: New Year fireworks over Marina Bay
options.why: Singapore's Marina Bay rings in the New Year with a spectacular fireworks display that lights up the city skyline — one of Asia's most iconic countdown celebrations.
options.location_text: Marina Bay Sands, Singapore

lists.creator: dotzsoh-singapore
lists.headline: Luxury stays in Singapore
lists.lead: Marina Bay Sands Infinity Pool (Sand Suite)

options.name: Marina Bay Sands Infinity Pool (Sand Suite)
options.hook: Float above Singapore in a pool
options.why: The world's largest rooftop infinity pool atop one of the most Instagrammable hotels on Earth — the Sand Suite offers panoramic city views and sanctuary-level design.
options.location_text: Marina Bay Sands, 10 Bayfront Avenue, Singapore

options.name: The Barracks Hotel Sentosa
options.hook: Colonial heritage meets tropical pool paradise
options.why: A Forbes Travel Guide-recognised boutique hotel in a lovingly restored British barracks on Sentosa, with lush tropical pool gardens that feel worlds away from the city.
options.location_text: The Barracks Hotel, 2 Artillery Avenue, Sentosa, Singapore

options.name: Shangri-La Singapore Garden Wing Koi Pond
options.hook: A secret koi garden inside a luxury hotel
options.why: The Shangri-La Singapore's Garden Wing hides a stunning koi pond and tropical sanctuary — a rare slice of tranquil greenery in the heart of Orchard Road.
options.location_text: Shangri-La Singapore, 22 Orange Grove Road, Singapore

options.name: Marina Bay Sands — Premium Suite Tower 2
options.hook: Newly refurbished suite with skyline views
options.why: Freshly renovated premium suites at MBS come loaded with Elite Sands Lifestyle Card perks — complimentary experiences, resort dollars, and the best skyline vantage in the city.
options.location_text: Marina Bay Sands, 10 Bayfront Avenue, Singapore 018956

options.name: Hilton Singapore Orchard
options.hook: Singapore's chicest Orchard Road staycation
options.why: A luxury urban retreat on Orchard Road housing multiple acclaimed restaurants and a spa under one roof — perfect for a lavish Singapore staycation.
options.location_text: Hilton Singapore Orchard, 333 Orchard Road, Singapore

lists.creator: dotzsoh-singapore
lists.headline: Best experiences in Singapore
lists.lead: Christmas Wonderland at Gardens by the Bay

options.name: Christmas Wonderland at Gardens by the Bay
options.hook: A dazzling Christmas village in the tropics
options.why: Singapore's beloved annual Christmas festival transforms Gardens by the Bay into a fairground of glittering lights, a European market, rides, and festive installations.
options.location_text: Gardens by the Bay, 18 Marina Gardens Drive, Singapore

options.name: OCBC Skyway
options.hook: Walk above the treetops at Gardens by the Bay
options.why: An elevated walkway threading between the iconic Supertrees at Gardens by the Bay, offering a bird's-eye perspective over the sculptural grove and Marina Bay skyline.
options.location_text: OCBC Skyway, Gardens by the Bay, 18 Marina Gardens Drive, Singapore

options.name: Marina Bay Sands Rooftop Infinity Pool
options.hook: Sunset swim above the skyline
options.why: The world's largest rooftop infinity pool sits 57 floors up with a panoramic sweep of Singapore's iconic skyline — magical at golden hour.
options.location_text: Marina Bay Sands, 10 Bayfront Avenue, Singapore

options.name: Flower Dome – Sakura Festival, Gardens by the Bay
options.hook: Cherry blossoms bloom inside a glass dome
options.why: Singapore's iconic climate-controlled Flower Dome hosts a stunning Sakura festival with real cherry blossom displays — bringing the Japanese spring indoors year-round.
options.location_text: Flower Dome, Gardens by the Bay, 18 Marina Gardens Drive, Singapore
options.date_info: Sakura display seasonal — check Gardens by the Bay for current dates

options.name: Marina Bay Sands — Infinity Rooftop Pool
options.hook: Swim in the sky above Singapore
options.why: The world's largest rooftop infinity pool crowns the iconic Marina Bay Sands at 57 storeys, offering a surreal swim above the Singapore skyline — hotel guests only.
options.location_text: Marina Bay Sands, 10 Bayfront Avenue, Singapore 018956

options.name: Marina Bay Sands New Year Fireworks
options.hook: New Year fireworks over Marina Bay
options.why: Singapore's Marina Bay rings in the New Year with a spectacular fireworks display that lights up the city skyline — one of Asia's most iconic countdown celebrations.
options.location_text: Marina Bay Sands, Singapore

options.name: Lory Loft at Bird Paradise
options.hook: Walk among free-flying lories overhead
options.why: An open-air free-flight aviary at Bird Paradise (formerly Jurong Bird Park) where colourful lories swoop and land on visitors — a joyful, immersive wildlife encounter for all ages.
options.location_text: Bird Paradise, 20 Mandai Lake Road, Singapore

options.name: Andaz Macau
options.hook: Macau's most cinematic luxury hotel lobby
options.why: A design-forward luxury hotel inside Galaxy Macau where a jaw-dropping lobby fuses modern elegance with traditional Macanese heritage, setting the tone for an unforgettable stay.
options.location_text: Andaz Macau, Galaxy Macau, Cotai, Macau SAR

options.name: Andaz Kitchen
options.hook: Portuguese-Macanese flavours in one kitchen
options.why: A vibrant all-day restaurant at Andaz Macau celebrating the unique blend of Portuguese and Macanese culinary heritage in a welcoming, colourful setting.
options.location_text: Andaz Kitchen, Andaz Macau, Galaxy Macau, Cotai, Macau SAR

options.name: Blossom Palace (花悅庭)
options.hook: Peking duck and imperial Chinese elegance
options.why: An award-worthy fine-dining restaurant at Galaxy Macau serving authentic Beijing and Huaiyang cuisines with innovative flair — the must-try Peking duck is legendary.
options.location_text: Blossom Palace, Galaxy Macau, Cotai, Macau SAR

options.name: Raffles at Galaxy Macau – Panoramic Two-Bedroom Suite
options.hook: Sanctuary suite above Macau's glittering skyline
options.why: Raffles' opulent two-bedroom suite pairs breathtaking skyline and water views with VIP butler service, setting the gold standard for luxury in Macau.
options.location_text: Raffles at Galaxy Macau, Cotai, Macau

options.name: Raffles Lounge & Terrace
options.hook: The most elegant afternoon tea in Macau
options.why: Raffles' signature afternoon tea features finely crafted pastries and delicate sandwiches in an inviting terrace setting — effortlessly elegant and worth lingering over.
options.location_text: Raffles Lounge & Terrace, Raffles at Galaxy Macau, Cotai, Macau

options.name: Raffles Long Bar Macau
options.hook: Order the Macau Sling at this legendary bar
options.why: The Macau Sling is the star of Raffles' iconic Long Bar, a convivial gathering spot where the colonial-heritage glamour of the Singapore original meets Macau's energy.
options.location_text: Raffles Long Bar, Raffles at Galaxy Macau, Cotai, Macau

lists.creator: dotzsoh-singapore
lists.headline: Hidden gems in Singapore
lists.subhead: 6 spots locals rate, pulled from 6 reels

options.name: Alkaff Bridge
options.hook: Singapore's prettiest pedestrian bridge crossing
options.why: A vibrantly painted footbridge over the Singapore River at Robertson Quay, bursting with rainbow circles — one of the most photogenic and overlooked spots in the city.
options.location_text: Alkaff Bridge, Robertson Quay, Singapore

options.name: The Barracks Hotel Sentosa
options.hook: Colonial heritage meets tropical pool paradise
options.why: A Forbes Travel Guide-recognised boutique hotel in a lovingly restored British barracks on Sentosa, with lush tropical pool gardens that feel worlds away from the city.

options.name: Crystal Universe — ArtScience Museum
options.hook: Step inside a galaxy of falling crystals
options.why: teamLab's immersive Crystal Universe installation at ArtScience Museum envelops you in thousands of LEDs forming infinite constellation-like worlds — one of Singapore's most photogenic experiences.
options.location_text: ArtScience Museum, 6 Bayfront Avenue, Marina Bay Sands, Singapore

options.name: Maya Food Bomb — Fish Skin Bomb
options.hook: Singapore's crispiest salted egg fish skin
options.why: Salted egg fish skin snack made in Singapore — crispy, addictive, and bold-flavoured. Ships online and is hailed as one of the best takes on the local classic.
options.price_text: Free delivery above S$50 with code FREEDEL
